title: Crayon Poster Visual Poster AI
sourceTitle: Crayon Poster Visual Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable general visual template with general visual template with one clear subject, coherent setting, stable style, and clean composition. Reimagine this movie poster as a kid's crayon drawing on lined notebook paper. Keep every compositional element, character pose, typography, color palette, and layout identical to the original, changing only the art style. Use colored pencils and crayons with wobbly, unsteady lines and coloring that slightly goes outside the edges, simplified facial features, and basic. Fill the background with heavy crayon scribble strokes. Main. Subject: adult explorer standing beside a luminous object. Setting: minimal surreal studio space with one strong environmental clue. Style Direction: premium stylized poster illustration with clear subject hierarchy. Composition: centered hero composition, strong silhouette, balanced negative space. Palette: deep teal, warm white, muted red, and charcoal. Text Elements: short readable title and one small caption lines only if needed. Subject: Make adult explorer standing beside a luminous object the clear hero subject. Preserve the source prompt's subject hierarchy and avoid adding unrelated people or props. Scene and Context: Place the subject in minimal surreal studio space with one strong environmental clue. Keep the background details useful to the concept rather than decorative filler. Composition and Layout: Use centered hero composition, strong silhouette, balanced negative space. Keep the layout faithful to this template's own visual mechanic and do not introduce unrelated layout systems. Style and Rendering: Render in premium stylized poster illustration with clear subject hierarchy. Keep this template's fixed material, texture, camera, illustration, or UI finish consistent across variants. Color and Lighting: Use deep teal, warm white, muted red, and charcoal. Lighting should match the template mood, separate the hero subject from the background, and stay readable at thumbnail size. Visible Typography: English-only, Latin alphabet only. Use one concise English headline or short English labels only when the template needs visible writing; otherwise keep visible writing minimal, intentional, and clean. Quality Restrictions: Avoid random letters, watermarks, malformed hands or faces, broken anatomy, duplicate logos, noisy background clutter, unreadable microcopy, and off-style artifacts.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
